name: Crystal Pink Cadillacs
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll dough out and cut into 3-inch circles using a 3-inch car cutter.
2. Bake for 8-10 minutes until cooled.
3. Spread the cooled cookies with plain Royal Icing.
4. Immediately sprinkle with pink sugar crystals.
5. Decorate with small round candies and black licorice strips.
